notes: No pass required; show Massachusetts library card at admissions for 50% discount.
raw: Beginning on July 10, 2024, JFK Library will provide a 50% discount on admission for each visitor when they show their Gleason Public Library Card or other Massachusetts library card. No library pass is needed. Instead, each visitor should show their library card at the Admission Desk to receive the 50% discount (see details below). Visitors should present their physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive the 50% discount on the card holder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and each visitor must present their Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Service Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600 Advanced ticket reservations are encouraged but not required. Visit https://www.jfklibrary.or/visit-museum/visit/plan-your-trip for details and to reserve tickets in advance. The last admission sale is at 3:30 p.m.
